name: 4p11_pericentromeric_SD
description: 4p11 pericentromeric SD mosaic — part of the inter-chromosomal pericentromeric duplication network. Shares ~95% identity blocks with pericentromeres of chr1, 2, 9, 16, 22. Contains anonymous ORFs (formerly mis-annotated as genes) and DUX4-like retrocopies. Frequent assembly gaps in pre-T2T builds; fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric mosaic of SD blocks of 50-200 kb shared with multiple chromosome pericentromeres; DUX4L retrocopies; alpha-satellite admixture; resolved fully only in T2T-CHM13.
